_source: Reeds Almanac §9.23.33 Ría de Arosa marina list + masmar (Pedras Negras coords) — the additional Arousa marinas Reeds lists that weren't yet distinct entries.

areas.name: Cabo de Cruz
areas.accessNote: Marina on the N shore of Ría de Arousa (Boiro). Depth unverified — check chart.
areas.description: Puerto Deportivo de Cabo de Cruz (Boiro), Ría de Arousa N shore. Reeds §9.23.33.

marina.name: Puerto Deportivo Cabo de Cruz
marina.notes: Reeds: Ría de Arousa N shore (Boiro); €2.10/m.

areas.name: Rianxo
areas.accessNote: Marina on the E/SE shore of Ría de Arousa, near Vilagarcía. Depth unverified — check chart.
areas.description: Marina de Rianxo, Ría de Arousa. Reeds §9.23.33.

areas.name: Pedras Negras (San Vicente do Mar)
areas.accessNote: At the SW mouth of Ría de Arousa (O Grove / San Vicente do Mar) — deep entrance.
areas.description: Club Náutico San Vicente do Mar — Porto Pedras Negras, at the transition between Ría de Arousa and Ría de Pontevedra. Reeds §9.23.33.

marina.name: CN San Vicente do Mar — Porto Pedras Negras
marina.notes: Reeds/masmar: O Grove peninsula, SW entrance of Ría de Arousa.

areas.name: Marina Parque das Nações
areas.accessNote: Up the Tejo at the former Expo site; inner channel ~2.5 m — enter near HW for deeper draught.
areas.description: Marina Parque das Nações, upper Tejo (Lisbon). Reeds §9.24.

marina.name: Marina Parque das Nações
marina.notes: Reeds: upper Tejo (Expo); inner channel ~2.5 m.
